From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Chinese Jia-A League 1995](/w/index.php?title=Chinese_Jia-A_League_1995&redirect=no "Chinese Jia-A League 1995"))

Football league season

[Chinese Jia-A League](/wiki/Chinese_Jia-A_League "Chinese Jia-A League")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 1995 |
| Champions | [Shanghai Shenhua](/wiki/Shanghai_Shenhua_F.C. "Shanghai Shenhua F.C.") |
| Relegated | [Qingdao Hainiu](/wiki/Qingdao_Hainiu_F.C. "Qingdao Hainiu F.C.")   [Liaoning](/wiki/Liaoning_F.C. "Liaoning F.C.") |
| [Asian Club Championship](/wiki/1996%E2%80%9397_Asian_Club_Championship "1996–97 Asian Club Championship") | [Shanghai Shenhua](/wiki/Shanghai_Shenhua_F.C. "Shanghai Shenhua F.C.") |
| Matches | 132 |
| Goals | 337 (2.55 per match) |
| Top goalscorer | [Fan Zhiyi](/wiki/Fan_Zhiyi "Fan Zhiyi") (15 goals) |
| Average attendance | 23,790 |
| ← [1994](/wiki/1994_Chinese_Jia-A_League "1994 Chinese Jia-A League")  [1996](/wiki/1996_Chinese_Jia-A_League "1996 Chinese Jia-A League") → | |

The **1995 [Chinese Jia-A League](/wiki/Chinese_Jia-A_League "Chinese Jia-A League") season**, also known as **[Marlboro](/wiki/Marlboro "Marlboro") Jia-A League** for sponsorship reasons, was the second season of [professional](/wiki/Professional_sports "Professional sports") [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") league and the 34th top-tier overall league season held in China. Starting on April 16 and ending on November 19, the league saw [Shanghai Shenhua](/wiki/Shanghai_Shenhua_F.C. "Shanghai Shenhua F.C.") win the championship.

## Promotion and relegation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995_Chinese_Jia-A_League&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Promotion and relegation")]

**Teams promoted from [1994 Chinese Jia-B League](/w/index.php?title=1994_Chinese_Jia-B_League&action=edit&redlink=1 "1994 Chinese Jia-B League (page does not exist)")**

* [Qingdao Hainiu](/wiki/Qingdao_Hainiu_F.C. "Qingdao Hainiu F.C.")
* [Tianjin Samsung](/wiki/Tianjin_Jinmen_Tiger_F.C. "Tianjin Jinmen Tiger F.C.")

**Relegated after end of [1994 Chinese Jia-A League](/wiki/1994_Chinese_Jia-A_League "1994 Chinese Jia-A League")**

* [Shenyang Liuyao](/wiki/Guangzhou_City_F.C. "Guangzhou City F.C.")
* [Jiangsu Maint](/wiki/Jiangsu_F.C. "Jiangsu F.C.")

## Overview

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995_Chinese_Jia-A_League&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Overview")]

It was contested by 12 teams, and [Shanghai Shenhua](/wiki/Shanghai_Shenhua_F.C. "Shanghai Shenhua F.C.") won the championship.

## Awards

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995_Chinese_Jia-A_League&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Awards")]

**Player of the Year (Golden Ball Award)**

* [Fan Zhiyi](/wiki/Fan_Zhiyi "Fan Zhiyi") (Shanghai Shenhua)

**Top Scorer (Golden Boot Award)**

* [Fan Zhiyi](/wiki/Fan_Zhiyi "Fan Zhiyi") (Shanghai Shenhua)

**Manager of the Year**

* [Xu Genbao](/wiki/Xu_Genbao "Xu Genbao") (Shanghai Shenhua)

**CFA Team of the Year**

**Goalkeeper**: [Ou Chuliang](/wiki/Ou_Chuliang "Ou Chuliang") (Guangdong Hongyuan)
  
**Defence**: [Wei Qun](/wiki/Wei_Qun "Wei Qun") (Sichuan Quanxing), [Xu Hong](/wiki/Xu_Hong "Xu Hong") (Dalian Wanda), [Fan Zhiyi](/wiki/Fan_Zhiyi "Fan Zhiyi") (Shanghai Shenhua), [Li Hongjun](/wiki/Li_Hongjun "Li Hongjun") (Jilin Yanbian)
  
**Midfield**: [Peng Weiguo](/wiki/Peng_Weiguo "Peng Weiguo") (Guangzhou Apollo), [Gao Hongbo](/wiki/Gao_Hongbo "Gao Hongbo") (Beijing Guoan), [Cao Xiandong](/wiki/Cao_Xiandong "Cao Xiandong") (Beijing Guoan)
  
**Attack**: [Hao Haidong](/wiki/Hao_Haidong "Hao Haidong") (August 1st), [Li Bing](/wiki/Li_Bing_(footballer) "Li Bing (footballer)") (Guangdong Hongyuan), [Gao Feng](/wiki/Gao_Feng_(footballer) "Gao Feng (footballer)") (Beijing Guoan),
